content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Easy Mode
description: Easy Mode is an Effervescent Maliwan shield introduced in Borderlands 2 with the Commander Lilith and the Fight for Sanctuary DLC.
notes: With Salvador, Gunzerking while the Peak Opener is in the left hand can cause its damage bonus to apply to the weapon in the right hand as well.

special.description:
In the Raid on Digistruct Peak, it gains extra effects when used with the Hard Carry relic or the Peak Opener:

- +300 percent maximum health
- Fight For Your Life lasts 2 minutes
- +100 percent Peak Opener damage

Quirk: its nova seems to trigger only when the Law pistol is held, and the damage is minimal.
special.title: Keep the pressure up without getting bodied.

abilities: While Peak Opener is in your hands its damage in the Raid on Digistruct Peak is increased.
